title: Stinco di Maiale Glazed with Rosemary & Mustard + Roasted Vegetables
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C. Scatter carrots, onions, and potatoes on a tray; season with olive oil, salt, pepper, and rosemary.
Boil the stinco in its sealed packet as instructed (usually 20-25 minutes).
Mix mustard and honey. Remove the shank from its bag and brush the glaze all over.
Roast everything for 20-25 minutes, turning once, until glossy and caramelized.
